title: phragmites australis subsp. altissimus
intro: Phragmites australis subsp. altissimus, also known as giant or tall reed grass, is a subspecies of Phragmites australis, a perennial wetland grass native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Phragmites australis subsp. altissimus include soothing digestive issues, treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma, and reducing inflammation in the body. The herbal preparations of Phragmites australis subsp. altissimus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
